member.name: M:nxm.upu.builder.__upu__.set_prop_input_data_ref(System.String,System.String,nxm.system.core.data.types.basic._variant_set_)
member.summary: reads value from input (input-path) and sets element property to data-reference pointing to this path

member.name: M:nxm.upu.builder.__upu__.apply_const(System.String,nxm.system.core.data.types.basic._variant_)
member.summary: set element's property value to const value

member.name: M:nxm.upu.builder.__upu__.input_mapping(System.String[])
member.summary: store result element's input reader mapping in it

member.name: M:nxm.upu.builder.__upu__.set_prop_output_data_ref(System.String,System.String,nxm.system.core.data.types.basic._variant_set_)
member.summary: reads value from output (output-path) and sets element property to data-reference pointing to this path

member.name: M:nxm.upu.builder.__upu__.output_mapping(System.String[])
member.summary: store result element's output writer mapping in it

member.name: M:nxm.upu.builder.__upu__.table_column(nxm.upu.element.upu_table.column)
member.summary: set element's property value from const

member.name: M:nxm.upu.builder.__upu__._create_child(System.Func{nxm.upu.element.upu_container_,nxm.upu.element.upu_element_})
member.summary: create child element usign given element-factory

member.name: M:nxm.upu.builder.__upu__._transform_path(System.String)
member.summary: converts part from dot-separated parts (root.field.field) into slash-separated once (root/field/field) as required by idata_reader

member.name: M:nxm.upu.builder.__upu__Extensions.parent(nxm.upu.builder.fpUPUBuilder)
member.summary: set parent as current builder target

member.name: M:nxm.upu.builder.__upu__Extensions.list(nxm.upu.builder.fpUPUBuilder,nxm.upu.builder.fpUPUBuilder[])
member.summary: add sequence of builders to execution chain (simmilar to sequence of 'next' calls)

member.name: M:nxm.upu.builder.__upu__Extensions.children(nxm.upu.builder.fpUPUBuilder,nxm.upu.builder.fpUPUBuilder[])
member.summary: add sequence of child builders to execution chain (next builder will operate again on container)

member.name: M:nxm.upu.builder.__upu__Extensions.set_prop_input_data_ref(nxm.upu.builder.fpUPUBuilder,System.String,System.String,nxm.system.core.data.types.basic._variant_set_)
member.summary: chainable version of apply_dataref reads: value from input (input-path), writes to output-datahive, and sets element property to (output-path)

member.name: M:nxm.upu.builder.__upu__Extensions.set_prop_output_data_ref(nxm.upu.builder.fpUPUBuilder,System.String,System.String,nxm.system.core.data.types.basic._variant_set_)
member.summary: chainable version of apply_dataref reads: value from input (input-path), writes to output-datahive, and sets element property to (output-path)

member.name: M:nxm.upu.builder.__upu__Extensions.apply_const(nxm.upu.builder.fpUPUBuilder,System.String,nxm.system.core.data.types.basic._variant_)
member.summary: chainable version of apply_const: set element's property value to const value

member.name: M:nxm.upu.builder.__upu__Extensions.input_mapping(nxm.upu.builder.fpUPUBuilder,System.String[])
member.summary: replaces input reader with mapping one. chainable version

member.name: M:nxm.upu.builder.__upu__Extensions.output_mapping(nxm.upu.builder.fpUPUBuilder,System.String[])
member.summary: replaces output reader with mapping one. chainable version

member.name: M:nxm.upu.builder.__upu__Extensions.page_header(nxm.upu.builder.fpUPUBuilder)
member.summary: set table page-header as current builder. when finished call .parent to restore table as current one

member.name: M:nxm.upu.builder.__upu__Extensions.header(nxm.upu.builder.fpUPUBuilder)
member.summary: set table header as current builder. when finished call .parent to restore table as current one

member.name: M:nxm.upu.builder.__upu__Extensions.footer(nxm.upu.builder.fpUPUBuilder)
member.summary: set table footer as current builder. when finished call .parent to restore table as current one

member.name: M:nxm.upu.builder.__upu__Extensions._datatext(nxm.upu.builder.fpUPUBuilder,System.String)
member.summary: set text property to data reference

member.name: F:nxm.upu.core.upu_type.PAGE_HEADER
member.summary: header within a page in a section, table

member.name: F:nxm.upu.core.upu_type.PAGE_FOOTER
member.summary: footer within a page in a section, table

member.name: F:nxm.upu.core.upu_type.SWITCH
member.summary: Type tag and convert to upu.switch_ and upu.case_ in emit_builder

member.name: F:nxm.upu.core.upu_type.TEXT
member.summary: FUTURE 2.0 - Type tag and convert to upu.if_ and upu.else_ in emit_builder

member.name: T:nxm.upu.core.renderers.xml.xml_renderer
member.summary: UPU-document "renderer" generating XML with all read data it performs simillar operations to real renderer, but generates only XML document with non-constant data (read from input data source) such document can be later played back to another renderer

member.name: M:nxm.upu.core.renderers.xml.xml_renderer.render(System.String,nxm.upu.core.renderers.xml.xml_renderer.creation_params,nxm.upu.element.upu_element_,nxm.data.core.access.idata_reader,nxm.data.core.access.idata_reader)
member.summary: render document using given upu-element tree and input-data

member.name: T:nxm.upu.core.renderers.xml.xml_renderer._rendering_context_
member.summary: rendering context most important task is properly managed symbols defined by various elements

member.name: M:nxm.upu.core.renderers.xml.xml_renderer._rendering_context_.apply_input_symbols(nxm.upu.element.upu_element_,nxm.data.core.access.mapping_data_reader)
member.summary: apply input symbols and optionally create new, derived data reader

member.name: M:nxm.upu.core.renderers.xml.xml_renderer._rendering_context_.apply_output_symbols(nxm.upu.element.upu_element_,nxm.data.core.access.mapping_data_writer)
member.summary: apply outpu symbols and optionally create new, derived data reader

member.name: T:nxm.upu.element.upu_case
member.summary: "case" pseudo element - child of 'switch' element used for conditional rendering

member.name: T:nxm.upu.element.upu_component_wrapper
member.summary: dedicated container to wrap incjected components

member.name: T:nxm.upu.element.upu_container_
member.summary: base class for all upu-containers (elements containing other elements)

member.summary: do deep dump of element for diagnostic purposes

member.name: T:nxm.upu.element.upu_default
member.summary: "default" pseudo element - child of 'switch' element used for conditional rendering

member.summary: loads element from input XML. returns true when element was recognized and loaded. otherwise returns false - caller must process such element or skip tags (skip_children)

member.summary: header tag - used in section and table

member.summary: prepare upu-builder from given resource and component ID. it can create dynamic assembly .DLL

member.summary: returns collector type from given type name

member.summary: create clone of existing collector with value set to initial one

member.summary: tries to returns value from given data-path

member.name: M:nxm.upu.renderer.data_collector_set.get_total_value(System.String)
member.summary: returns value collected from beginning up to this moment

member.name: M:nxm.upu.renderer.data_collector_set.get_page_value(System.String)
member.summary: returns value collected from current page begin up to this moment

member.name: F:nxm.upu.renderer.data_collector_set.m_dictTotalCollectors
member.summary: collector set defined for entire element life

member.name: F:nxm.upu.renderer.data_collector_set.m_dictPageCollectors
member.summary: collcteor set defined for single page when element renders

member.name: F:nxm.upu.renderer.Globals.debug_dump_2_console
member.summary: True - wyświetla w console wynik obliczeń współżędnych i szerokości oraz wysokości obiektów drukowanych

member.name: F:nxm.upu.renderer.Globals.debug_rect
member.summary: ^^^ - powoduje wygenerowanie kolorowego border wogół każdego elementu w dokumencie PDF do momentu powtórzenia pola text z treścią ^^^

member.name: F:nxm.upu.renderer.Globals._atomize_switch_inherit_text
member.summary: True - dziedzicz border w atomie text, False - border musi być wskazane jawnie np.: text border=""

member.name: F:nxm.upu.renderer.Globals._atomize_switch_inherit_table
member.summary: True - dziedzicz generuje border i padding w atomie table dziedziczące, False - borders i padding nie będzie generowane dla samego table chyba że jawnie wpiszesz np.: table border=""

member.name: F:nxm.upu.renderer.Globals._atomize_switch_inherit_row
member.summary: True - dziedzicz borders i padding w atomie row, False - border i padding musi być wskazane jawnie np.: row border=""

member.name: F:nxm.upu.renderer.Globals._atomize_switch_inherit_cell
member.summary: True - dziedzicz borders i padding w atomie cell, False - border i padding musi być wskazane jawnie np.: cell border=""

member.name: M:nxm.upu.renderer.styling_context_.apply_styling(nxm.upu.element.upu_element_,nxm.upu.core.upu_style)
member.summary: creates new effective style from existing one and defined element properties. when no source style is given, new one with defaults is created

member.name: F:nxm.upu.renderer.styling_context_._s_StyleProperties
member.summary: list of properties used to construct current effective style most frequent should be at begining

member.name: M:nxm.upu.renderer.utilities._pt2cm(System.Decimal)
member.summary: converts typographical points (1/72 of inch) into centimeters

member.name: M:nxm.upu.renderer.utilities._cm2pt(System.Decimal)
member.summary: converts centimeters into typographical points (1/72 of inch)

member.name: F:nxm.upu.renderer.utilities._explode
member.summary: split text into words, tabs, newlines

member.name: T:nxm.upu.renderer._upu_atom_border_
member.summary: utility class containing atom's border settings

member.name: M:nxm.upu.renderer._upu_atom_border_._get_final_border_width(nxm.system.core.data.types.basic._variant_)
member.summary: Returns the thickness of an edge. If not set, it will return o Missing, which is a neutral value that indicates no edge thickness.

member.name: M:nxm.upu.renderer._upu_atom_border_._get_final_padding(nxm.system.core.data.types.basic._variant_,System.Decimal)
member.summary: Returns the thickness of an edge. If not set, it will return o Missing, which is a neutral value that indicates no edge thickness.

member.name: T:nxm.upu.renderer.html.html_renderer
member.summary: creates PDF output for given upu_document or fragment

member.name: P:nxm.upu.renderer.html.html_renderer.atom_base_.style
member.summary: Przechowuje wygenerowane w przebiegu atomize style atomu

member.name: P:nxm.upu.renderer.html.html_renderer.atom_base_.styles_only_tag
member.summary: style properties which must be in "style" attribute and cannot be moved into CSS class

member.name: P:nxm.upu.renderer.html.html_renderer.atom_base_.class_name
member.summary: CSS class name assigned to given HTML tag

member.name: P:nxm.upu.renderer.html.html_renderer.image_atom.background
member.summary: True - draw background (absolute coordinates in left and top parameters)

member.name: M:nxm.upu.renderer.html.html_renderer.multi_line_atom._distribute_to_lines(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{nxm.upu.renderer.html.html_renderer.iatom})
member.summary: assigns consecutive items into 'lines', returns composite atom

member.name: M:nxm.upu.renderer.html.html_renderer.multi_line_atom._distribute_to_lines(nxm.upu.renderer.html.html_renderer.iatom)
member.summary: assigns consecutive items into 'lines', returns composite atom

member.name: P:nxm.upu.renderer.html.html_renderer.creation_params.output_dto_factory
member.summary: factory used to create HTML document output 'containers'

member.name: M:nxm.upu.renderer.html.html_renderer.render(System.String,nxm.upu.renderer.html.html_renderer.creation_params,nxm.upu.element.upu_element_,nxm.data.core.access.idata_reader,nxm.data.core.access.idata_reader)
member.summary: render document using given upu-element tree and input-data

member.name: M:nxm.upu.renderer.html.html_renderer.width_from_context(nxm.upu.core.upu_style,nxm.upu.renderer.html._style_)
member.summary: get style from oContext and write to oHTMLStyle

member.name: T:nxm.upu.renderer.html.html_renderer.compute_sizes_context
member.summary: compute_context - parametry sterujące obliczeniami szerokości i wysokości obiektów złożonych

member.name: T:nxm.upu.renderer.html.html_renderer._format_css
member.summary:
Style - formatowanie w atrybucie style, np.:
Head - formatowanie w nagłówku strony w
Outside - formatowanie w zewnętrznym pliku css

member.name: T:nxm.upu.renderer.html.html_renderer._format_image
member.summary: OnlyInside - wszystkie image wklej do tagu OnlyOutside - nie ingeruj w adres pliku z obrazem, wygeneruj tag img z wartością podaną przez źródło danych Mixed - pliki ze strumienia dołączaj do pliku HTML (tak jak w onlyInside) a ścieżki na serwerach internetowych pozostaw w atrybucie src

member.name: T:nxm.upu.renderer.html.html_renderer._format_html
member.summary: Page - ustaw wszystkie elementy na stronie bezwzględnie z pełną kontrolą podziału na strony ignorePage - zgodnie z ustawieniami zapisanymi w szablonie. Ignoruje podział na strony. Pozwala wyświetlać tak jak chce przeglądarka HTML (np.: program pocztowy, przeglądarka internetowa itp.) Relative - ustaw wartości szerokości zgodnie z szablonem a inne parametry traktuj jak względne

member.name: T:nxm.upu.renderer.html.html_renderer._usage
member.summary:
WWW - domyślnie ustawia: Outside, OnlyOutside, Relative Email - domyślnie ustawia: Style, OnlyInside, Relative EmailHead - domyślnie ustawia: Style, Mixed, Relative Print - domyślnie ustawia: Head, OnlyInside, Page
[TO-REVIEW]

member.name: M:nxm.upu.renderer.html.html_renderer._atomizing_context_.adjust_current(nxm.upu.element.upu_element_,nxm.upu.core.upu_style,nxm.upu.core.upu_style)
member.summary: Dostosowanie dziedziczenia zgodnie z ustawieniami w class Globals

member.name: P:nxm.upu.renderer.html.html_renderer._creation_params
member.summary: creation parameters used to instantaniate renderer

member.name: M:nxm.upu.renderer.html._tag_writer_.merge(nxm.upu.renderer.html._style_)
member.summary: Złącz już istniejące parametry z nowymi. Nowe zastąpią poprzednie - do poprawienia

member.summary: set HTML tag value (usefull for spans, anchors etc.

UPU-document paginating render common base class

member.summary: base class for most paginating renderer atoms

member.summary: available outer width of an atom

member.name: P:nxm.upu.renderer.paginating.paginating_renderer_.atom_base_.outer_height
member.summary: available outer height of an atom

member.name: P:nxm.upu.renderer.paginating.paginating_renderer_.atom_base_.left
member.summary: Współrzędna bezwzgędna X, drukowania atomu. 0 - drukuje w bieżącm miejscu

member.name: P:nxm.upu.renderer.paginating.paginating_renderer_.atom_base_.top
member.summary: Współrzędna bezwzgędna Y, drukowania atomu. 0 - drukuje w bieżącm miejscu

member.name: P:nxm.upu.renderer.paginating.paginating_renderer_.atom_base_.keep
member.summary: Czy drukować całość na jednej stronie

member.name: P:nxm.upu.renderer.paginating.paginating_renderer_.iatom.keep
member.summary: Forces printing of the entire container on one page whenever possible

member.summary: Sprawdza czy atom można w całości wydrukować na stronie lub w jakiej części

member.summary: implemented by atoms having page footers and headers

member.summary: called on page end - drawing page-footer and necessary maintenance

member.summary: przesunięcie drukowania od lewej w linii

member.name: T:nxm.upu.renderer.paginating.paginating_renderer_.multi_line_atom
member.summary: container atom, containing sequence of line-atoms (which should to be rendered one below another)

member.name: P:nxm.upu.renderer.paginating.paginating_renderer_.multi_line_atom.page_number
member.summary: first page number where begins first line

member.summary: assigns consecutive items into 'lines', returns composite atom and create if necessary new line

member.summary: utility class used to compute table row heights

member.name: M:nxm.upu.renderer.paginating.paginating_renderer_.table_atom._row_height_info_._compute_height
member.summary: compute row height and remove processed cells

member.name: F:nxm.upu.renderer.paginating.paginating_renderer_.table_atom._cells_used_.m_arrCells
member.summary: array containg number of grid-cell uses 0 - cell is unused 1 - cell is 'normally' used > 1 - cell is used by many element - it's template design error

member.name: F:nxm.upu.renderer.paginating.paginating_renderer_.table_atom.m_arrRowsUsed
member.summary: array of information about grid-cell usage (necessary for properly align cells in colspan > 1/ rowspan > 1 [cell merging] scenario)

member.name: P:nxm.upu.renderer.paginating.paginating_renderer_.table_cell_atom.col_number
member.summary: numer kolumny od lewej, liczone od 0

member.name: P:nxm.upu.renderer.paginating.paginating_renderer_.table_row_atom.row_number
member.summary: row number in the parent (e.g. table, table_header)

member.summary: Defines a particular format for text, including font face, size, and style attributes.

member.name: P:nxm.upu.renderer.paginating.paginating_renderer_.text_atom.brush
member.summary: Provides objects used to fill the interiors of graphical shapes such as rectangles, ellipses, pies, polygons, and paths.

member.summary: przechowywana zawartość (automatycznie wyliczana wysokość i szerokość przy zapamiętywaniu)

member.summary: calculates width and height atom, bVisible is False then atom not draw

member.summary: minimalna wysokość do wydrukowania - jedna linijka

member.summary: ile ma cały element do wydrukowania

member.name: M:nxm.upu.renderer.paginating._keep_check_result_.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: zapamiętaj wartość czy wymuszać przejście na inną stronę

member.name: F:nxm.upu.renderer.paginating._keep_check_result_.can_draw
member.summary: True - wydrukuje wszystko na bieżącej stronie, False - wymaga sprawdzenia co się nie zmieści na bieżącej stronie

member.summary: runtime support library for UPU rendering

member.summary: utility to simplify creating output documents from UPU-templates and data

member.name: M:nxm.upu.document.upu_document_builder.prepare(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context)
member.summary: prepare generator, compile supporting assembly and create upu-builder. (call once for template - generator may be reused to create multiple documents for multiple data sets)

member.summary: build upu-element-tree (call once for each data set)

member.summary: render prepared upu-trees as PDFs (call once for each data set)

member.summary: render prepared upu-trees as HTML (call once for each data set)

member.summary: create dedicated font-provider, which simplifies some font addresing
